name: Ternary Cloud FinOps API
what_it_does: Cloud FinOps platform specializing in Google Cloud with REST API — providing GCP cost visibility, anomaly detection, committed use discount (CUD) optimization, showback and chargeback reporting, and actionable cost reduction recommendations specifically tuned for Google Cloud billing data.
use_cases: Querying GCP cost breakdown by project, service, and label for FinOps reporting
Monitoring cloud cost anomalies and budget alerts via Ternary API
Pulling committed use discount (CUD) coverage analysis for optimization decisions
Integrating chargeback cost allocation data with internal billing systems
Automating monthly cloud cost reports for engineering team budget accountability
not_for: Multi-cloud FinOps covering AWS and Azure (Ternary is GCP-primary)
Real-time cloud resource provisioning and infrastructure management
Small organizations with minimal GCP spend
best_when: A Google Cloud-primary engineering organization wants deep GCP cost analysis, CUD optimization, and chargeback reporting with GCP-specific expertise and recommendations.
avoid_when: You need multi-cloud coverage (AWS + Azure + GCP together), or your primary cloud is AWS or Azure rather than GCP.

auth.notes: OAuth2 via Google Cloud identity or Ternary service account. GCP IAM integration. Bearer token in Authorization header. Organization-scoped access. No webhooks. Ternary service account requires GCP Billing Account viewer permissions.

pricing.paid_tiers: Percentage of managed cloud spend; contact sales
pricing.notes: San Francisco-based company. Founded 2020. Raised $8M. GCP-specialized FinOps. Deep Google Cloud Billing data integration. CUD (Committed Use Discount) analysis is primary differentiator. Strong in GCP-primary engineering organizations. Slack integration for cost alerts. Google Cloud Partner.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for cost data, recommendations, and reports. GCP OAuth2 auth. Good documentation. GCP Billing account connection required before data is available. Cost data has 24-48 hour latency from GCP billing export. CUD recommendations are GCP-specific — understand GCP commitment types.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Cost reads fully idempotent by date range. Recommendation reads idempotent. Report reads idempotent. All query operations safe to retry.
known_agent_gotchas: GCP Billing account connection required before any cost data is queryable
Ternary service account needs GCP Billing Account Viewer role — not project-level
Cost data has 24-48 hour latency from GCP billing export pipeline
CUD recommendations are GCP-specific — understand on-demand vs committed pricing
No webhooks — implement polling scheduler for cost anomaly detection

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. GCP IAM OAuth2 — strong identity foundation. Cloud billing data is sensitive financial information. Ternary service account permissions must be least-privilege. Google Cloud Partner with security review.
